title: Tool
description: A tool specification — handlers for mouse/keyboard events, tool-local state, and an optional render overlay. Each tool YAML file in workspace/tools/ must match this schema.

id.description: Tool identifier. Must match the filename stem.

cursor.description: CSS cursor name or a custom cursor defined in theme.

menu_label.description: Human-readable label shown in tool-switcher menus.

shortcut.description: Keyboard shortcut that activates this tool (single char or chord).

platform.description: Platform filter. Omit for all platforms.

state.description: Tool-local state slots. Namespaced as $tool.<id>.* in expressions.

default.description: Default value — any JSON scalar or object.

enum.description: Optional enumeration of valid values. Validator checks all writes against this list if specified.

handlers.description: Event handlers. Each key is an event name; value is an effect list.

overlay.description: Tool overlay drawn into the canvas overlay layer each frame the `if:` guard is truthy.

if.description: Expression evaluated each frame; overlay renders when truthy.

render.description: Render spec — element type + attributes. Any expression-valued field is evaluated per frame.
